title: Breaking into Impel Down
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Ace as the scene develops across pages 1–4.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I am just a pirate-hating pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But you guys are totally different....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It might be surprising to you, ace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But I've visited Whitebeard's ship many times.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now... Fishman Island is at peace....!!
